name: PartyWoo Gold Balloons 50pcs 12 Inch Gold Latex Helium Balloons for Birthday Wedding Anniversary Baby Shower Graduation Bachelorette Retirement Engagement Tea Casino Disco Party Decorations Gold-G101
bullets: Package includes: 12 inch gold balloons (50 pcs), in a solid consistent color that brings vibrant energy, can widely used in birthday decorations, wedding decorations, baby shower decorations, and adding a vibrant touch to make your party bright.

Thick Durable Latex: These gold balloons are made with high quality thick material, each balloon stays full longer perfect for arches garlands centerpieces. Ensuring your engagement, birthday decorations stays perfect from setup to celebration end.

What To Fill With: Metallic gold balloons filled with AIR will stay full for up to 72 hours, while with HELIUM will stay full for 3-6 hours. For best float results, fill helium 1-2 hours before your event, can bring joy to birthday, baby shower.

Attention & Warning: Please DO NOT overfill the gold balloons and also avoid sunburn, overheat, pointed object and excessive friction. Control the amount of air inflated into each balloon to achieve your ideal balloon size, and enjoy your birthday party.

Perfect for Multiple Occasions: Whether it's a graduation party, baby shower decorations, wedding party, anniversary, retirement party, birthday, bachelorette party, casino party, these gold balloons are ideal and making your event more memorable.

reviews.name: Dayanna Rodríguez
reviews.title: Beautiful color
reviews.body: Great quality balloons! The color was exactly as shown in the pictures and they added a beautiful touch to my event. They were durable, easy to inflate, and looked very elegant. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Fantastic balloons
reviews.body: These balloons were the prettiest shade and the metallic finish is beautiful. They not only held up better than expected, but when disassembling the balloon wall, I was able to save many of the balloons to reuse.

reviews.name: Kinsley Moore
reviews.title: Good quality and accurate color
reviews.body: Color as expected and good quality! Easy to inflate!

reviews.name: Sasha
reviews.title: Great quality balloons
reviews.body: Great balloons! They held up really well and are really great quality. I believe 50 come in the pack and that was the perfect amount for balloons all over the ground. The size of the balloons also was very large, which made them fun. Will definitely save the company and buy more balloons from them.
